rationale: Educ. Code §29.556 governs P-TECH school designation and grant programs. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax appraised value, or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: From funds appropriated for that purpose, the commissioner by rule shall establish a grant program to assist school districts and open-enrollment charter schools in implementing the P-TECH program
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption increase and this P-TECH grant statute.
